architecture_fit.note: Carry chain is now a single parallel softmax-attention op (no column loop), directly resolving the goal's routing question; aces every slice.

baseline_comparison.note: Linear no-carry baseline (0.0 on every carrying slice) plus a carry-attention-ablated strawman both fail exactly where the circuit succeeds.

faithfulness.note: Built-in causal ablation: zeroing the carry-attention layer collapses to the linear baseline, flipping carrying slices 1.0->0 across 8 seeds.

operating_range.note: Holds exact-match 1.0 from 3 to 12 digits (operands to 10^12, carry chains 4x canonical) with worst-case full-chain injection, vs collapsing baseline.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entire circuit is hand-set torch on CUDA, nothing trained; the carry-lookahead identity is written out by hand.

visual_judgement.note: Heatmap renders the carry-as-attention hop (999+1 thousands query lands on units, 9s skipped); faithfulness bars + range line strong, though demo is somewhat busy and not launch-verified.

visualisation_rationale.note: README ties heatmap to the smallest object that if rerouted breaks the claim, bars to the minimal causal flip, line to scale — axes and baselines well justified.

notes: A strong hand-built interp circuit that genuinely reframes carry propagation as one parallel softmax-attention op, fixing pass_2's loop and acing the benchmark (carry_robustness 1.0, full lift over baseline). Causal ablation, multi-seed faithfulness, and a 3->12 digit operating range all reinforce the claim. Only minor reservation is the bespoke idealized construction and a slightly busy, unlaunched demo, keeping it just short of perfect.
